underlying_goal: Implement Phase 8 (Transformer/mini-GPT) of a C++ deep learning framework and run the demo end-to-end
friction_detail: First demo run crashed due to max_seq_len=128 being smaller than seed+generated tokens (210), requiring a fix and rerun.
brief_summary: User wanted to complete Phase 8 Transformer implementation and run the mini-GPT demo; Claude dispatched subagents to implement all 13 tasks (104 tests passing), fixed a seq_len bug, successfully ran the demo, and committed the fix.
